title: Campus Tour
scene: 新生入学前你参加校园导览。

turns.cn: 图书馆在这边，二十四小时开放期末周。
turns.en: The library is here. It's open twenty-four hours during finals.
How do we load the dining card?

turns.cn: 网上或学生中心机器，用学生ID。
turns.en: Online or at kiosks in the student center with your ID.
Is the gym free for students?
It's included in tuition. Show your student ID.
Where can I find bus routes?
The campus app shows live locations.

title: Dorm Check-in
scene: 开学日你办理宿舍入住。

turns.cn: 欢迎！请签入住表，领钥匙。
turns.en: Welcome! Sign in and pick up your key.

turns.cn: 室友还没到，我可以先选床位吗？
turns.en: My roommate isn't here yet. Can I pick a bed?

turns.cn: 可以，但最好等对方一起商量。
turns.en: You can, but it's better to wait and discuss together.
Which floor is laundry on?
First floor. Coins or student card.
What are quiet hours?
Ten PM to eight AM.

title: Joining a Club
scene: 社团招新周，你咨询英语辩论社。

turns.cn: 对辩论感兴趣？我们每周三练。
turns.en: Interested in debate? We practice Wednesdays.
Can beginners join? My speaking is just okay.
Yes. We train newcomers. Competitions are optional.
Is there a membership fee?

turns.cn: 一学期二十，含比赛交通。
turns.en: Twenty per semester, includes travel to meets.
Great. I'll fill out the form.
Welcome aboard!

title: Printing on Campus
scene: 你要打印论文，电脑显示余额不足。

turns.en: I can't print. It says insufficient balance.

turns.cn: 学生账户要充值，一页黑白七分。
turns.en: You need to add funds to your student account. Seven cents per black-and-white page.
Where do I add money?
Student portal. Five-dollar minimum.
What about color?
Twenty-five cents a page.
Got it. Thanks.

title: Career Fair
scene: 你在校园招聘会和招聘人员交流。

turns.en: Hi there. Do you know our company?

turns.cn: 做过功课，你们做云计算，我投软件工程岗。
turns.en: A bit. You do cloud computing. I'm interested in software engineering.

turns.cn: 太好了，请留简历，今晚网申。
turns.en: Great. Leave your resume and apply online tonight.
Can internships convert to full-time?

turns.cn: 表现好可以，明年八月入职。
turns.en: Strong performers can start full-time next August.
Thank you. Nice meeting you.
Good luck!
